description: CompositionGrey  round neck T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves and brand logo below the nape of the neckFittingRegularWash careWash in cold waterDry in shadeIron on reverse of designIt's not the size that matters, it's the effort! If the pen can be mightier than a sword, you can be mightier than a dragon, too! Pair this T-shirt with denims and canvas shoes for a great casual look, and revel in the comfort of the cotton fabric all day long.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
